news.t: The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.
Why Dimensional Fund Advisors is launching its mutual funds as ETFs
Two of Dimensional's mutual funds launch as ETFs. Here's why

holdings.infoBox: DFAI is an equity ETF with a total of 3691 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 1.90%, Shell at 1.02%, HSBC Holdings at 1.01%, Roche Holding AG at 0.99%, and AstraZeneca at 0.91%.

overview.description: The Dimensional International Core Equity Market ETF (DFAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund that seeks a broad exposure to relatively low-priced and profitable stocks in developed countries outside the US. DFAI was launched on Nov 17, 2020 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.
data.text: To capture the market's full potential return, investment strategists recommend adding exposure to international markets, value stocks, and small- and mid-cap companies.
